pi_items.source: Task description and verifier require exactly 8 target stars to be selected.
Task description and verifier explicitly test for a minimum pairwise distance of 100 pixels between selected targets.
Task requires 10x10 ROI (radius 5) yielding an area of ~78.5. Verifier explicitly enforces a minimum acceptable area of 70.0.
Task requires 10x10 ROI (radius 5) yielding an area of ~78.5. Verifier explicitly enforces a maximum acceptable area of 85.0.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real FITS data of the globular cluster NGC 6652 from the ESA Hubble FITS Liberator datasets. The image (1600x1600 pixels) contains hundreds of stars, allowing for the required selection of exactly 8 targets. The minimum separation of 100 pixels and ROI area bounds (70.0 to 85.0) are precisely verified against the 10-pixel radius requirement and the corresponding verifier constraints.
